entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A crop of semi-arid tropics with remarkable tolerance to abiotic stresses

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where pearl millet is typically grown

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that cause stress to plants

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain function during water deficit

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A condition of water deficiency in the environment

entities.name: HIGH RESOLUTION CROSS
entities.description: A breeding method used to generate recombinant inbred lines

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: Plant lines produced by crossing and inbreeding to study genetic variability

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which water evaporates from plant leaves

entities.name: VAPOUR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the amount of moisture in the air and how much moisture the air can hold when saturated

entities.name: PGAQPS
entities.description: Aquaporin genes in pearl millet involved in water transport

entities.name: PIP2 SUBFAMILY GENES
entities.description: A specific group of plasma membrane intrinsic protein aquaporin genes

entities.name: PIP2;1
entities.description: A specific gene within the PIP2 subfamily

entities.name: PIP2;3
entities.description: A specific gene within the PIP2 subfamily

entities.name: PIP2;6
entities.description: A specific gene within the PIP2 subfamily that responds to VPD

entities.name: PGPIP2;6
entities.description: The pearl millet PIP2;6 gene used for transgenic expression in tobacco

entities.name: TOBACCO
entities.description: The plant species used as a model for functional validation of the PgPIP2;6 gene

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL VALIDATION STUDIES
entities.description: Experimental studies to determine the role of a specific gene

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: High salt concentration in the soil, acting as an abiotic stress

entities.name: SOLUBLE SUGAR
entities.description: A biochemical marker indicating stress response and osmotic adjustment

entities.name: MEMBRANE STABILITY
entities.description: The ability of cell membranes to maintain integrity under stress

entities.name: ELECTROLYTE LEAKAGE
entities.description: The loss of ions from cells, indicating membrane damage

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC PARAMETERS
entities.description: Measurements related to the efficiency of photosynthesis
